creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
The freebsd-update-build project (https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-update-build) includes a script named "build-upgrade-patches.sh".  It appears to be an optional step, that generates binary diffs that freebsd-update can use.  However, there is no documentation for it.

Could somebody please update the article at https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/freebsd-update-server/ with information on how to use this script?  Where to execute it, why, when, and with what arguments?
